understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding hazards like spikes that immediately end the run, and doing so within the per-attempt 50-turn budget (2 attempts per level).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn I could MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After any horizontal move, gravity (DOWN in this episode) automatically carried the character until it landed on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes 'u'/'v' causing instant failure), or reached the goal '+'. CLICK could be used to remove breakable/clickable blocks ('x') at a specified target_position without moving the player and without consuming the platform timer (when present). UNDO would revert the previous action. The structured state (when provided) indicates where left/right moves would ultimately land after gravity resolves, which should be used to choose safe moves and identify passages to new y-level sections.
